# Service Areas API

Define geographic zones where your technicians operate.

## Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/service-areas` | List all service areas |
| POST | `/api/service-areas` | Create a service area |
| GET | `/api/service-areas/:id` | Get service area details |
| PUT | `/api/service-areas/:id` | Update a service area |
| DELETE | `/api/service-areas/:id` | Delete a service area |
| GET | `/api/service-areas/status` | Check service area status |

## Area Types

Service areas support three boundary types:
- **Radius** — Circle around a center point (lat/lng + miles)
- **Polygon** — Custom geographic boundary (array of coordinates)
- **Zip Code** — List of covered postal codes
